title: Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings 4in Mini Roller Sleeve 10 Pack 102012203
features: Pack of 4" replacement sleeves for the Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Mini Roller set
These 4 inch mini roller sleeves have been developed to give an even finish when painting with emulsion paint.

The roller sleeves have been developed to give a great finish with reduced splatter for less mess and the medium pile is ideal for use on semi-smooth surfaces such as older plastered walls and walls with spots of repair damage.
For best results, lightly rinse the roller sleeve in water before use to remove any loose fibres.
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! 10 Pack Replacement 4in Roller Sleeves for Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings 4in Mini Roller Set Whats Included Contents 1 x 10 4in medium pile replacement roller sleeves Replacement 4 in Walls & Ceilings Roller Sleeves 10 pack of 4in medium pile replacement sleeves for Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Mini Roller set. Developed to give a great even finish, with reduced splatter when painting with emulsion paint. Ideal for use on semi-smooth surfaces such as older plastered walls and walls with spots of repair damage. For best results, lightly rinse the sleeve in water before use to remove any loose fibres. Doing a Project Don't forget... to get the same paint finish team your 4in Seriously Good Roller Sleeves with the 9in Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Roller Set and our range of Seriously Good Walls and Ceilings Paint Brushes. These replacement sleeves fit any Harris 4in roller frame. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier
